ground.cypher:
MATCH
    p1 = (actor:Person {name: 'Martin Scorsese'})-[r1:ACTED_IN]->(movie:Movie {title: 'Taxi Driver'})-[r2:REVIEWED]->(review:Movie),
    p2 = (actor)-[r3:DIRECTED]->(movie),
    p3 = (actor)-[r4:WROTE]->(script:Movie {title: 'Raging Bull'})
RETURN p1, p2, p3
ground.question: How does Martin Scorsese’s directorial work on *Taxi Driver* compare to the impact of his written script *Raging Bull* on his later career trajectory?

cypher: MATCH (p:Person {name: "Martin Scorsese"})-[:DIRECTED]->(m1:Movie {title: "Taxi Driver"}),       (p)-[:WROTE]->(m2:Movie {title: "Raging Bull"})\nRETURN p, m1, m2
